cocreate.title: Co-Create & Share
cocreate.subtitle: CO-CREATE
cocreate.desc: This is Kunlun Nest's core philosophy: every participant is both a beneficiary and a builder of our ecosystem.

communication.title: Open Communication
communication.subtitle: OPEN COMMUNICATION
communication.desc: We foster a barrier-free space for equal, open, and free exchange. Members discuss freely and build connections organically.

value.title: Value-Driven Focus
value.subtitle: VALUE RETURN
value.desc: Shifting from chasing funding and valuations to solving real problems. Our entrepreneurs focus on concrete collaborations, addressing pain points, and efficient execution.

capability.title: Capability Recombination
capability.subtitle: CAPABILITY RECOMBINATION
capability.desc: Beyond simple resource matching, we focus on 'genetic recombination of capabilities.' By reassembling success factors, we reduce the cost of failure—here, failure doesn't mean starting from zero.

robot.title: Humanoid Robotics Lab
robot.subtitle: HUMANOID ROBOT LAB
robot.desc: Led by Dr. Guo Chengkai, Head of Technology at Beijing Institute for General Artificial Intelligence. Focuses on embodied robotics, robotic arms, and AI model applications.

3dprint.title: 3D Printing Lab
3dprint.subtitle: 3D PRINTING LAB
3dprint.desc: Founded by Xu Fanglei, Beijing Innovation Talent Leader. Specializes in industrial design, additive manufacturing, and commercial prototyping for early-stage hardware.

aigc.title: AIGC Open Lab
aigc.subtitle: AIGC LAB
aigc.desc: Initiated by early Youku founding team R&D leaders. Focuses on AI enterprise solutions, AI content generation, and intelligent agent development.

sudi.name: Su Di
sudi.title: FOUNDER
sudi.desc: A pioneering figure in China's entrepreneurship ecosystem. Founded Garage Cafe (2011), co-founded YOU+ International Youth Community (2015), launched Zhongguancun Entrepreneurship Museum (2018), and co-founded Kunlun Nest with Bao Yueqiao (2023).

baoyueqiao.name: Bao Yueqiao
baoyueqiao.title: FOUNDER
baoyueqiao.desc: A legendary figure in China's IT industry. Creator of UCDOS (90% market share in 1995), founder of Ourgame.com (China's largest casual gaming platform in 2000), and founder of Leleketang (serving 70 million users).

cta.title:
JOIN THE
AI REVOLUTION
cta.subtitle: Be Part of Changing the World
cta.desc: Kunlun Nest brings together innovators in large language models, embodied intelligence, humanoid robotics, and deep tech to explore the future of AI together.

footer.company: Beijing Intelligent Road Technology Co., Ltd.
